title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!
